node.definition: Models update over a stream while balancing plasticity, stability, and catastrophic forgetting.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Continual & online learning is modeled as depending on Sequences, events & time series, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data and feeding downstream nodes such as Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines, Procedural memory & skills.
